text: Problem 10.6 $^{*}$ Draw a 12×6 weight matrix in the style of figure 10.4d relating inputs $x_{1}, \ldots, x_{6}$ to outputs $h_{1}, \ldots, h_{12}$ in the multi-channel convolution as depicted in figures 10.5a–b.
